mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document (id, kb_id, filename, file_path, file_size, mime_type, status, tags_json, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{kbId}, #{filename}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{status}, #{tagsJson}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE document SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM document WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document WHERE status = #{status}
